# Hugo + Nanny

> Authentic wedding photography and film by Hugo, Nanny & Tilmann. Real moments, real stories — captured quietly and honestly.

Hugo + Nanny is a wedding photography and film studio based in Germany, documenting weddings across Europe. The work focuses on unposed, candid storytelling rather than directed portraits.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Booking inquiry and intro to Hugo + Nanny's wedding photography and film.
- [About](/about): Our story, work samples, testimonials, pricing, and FAQ.
- [The Gang](/gang): Meet Hugo, Nanny & Tilmann.

## Optional

- [Contact via WhatsApp](https://wa.me/4916097813272): Fastest way to check date availability.
